BaseAddress.description: Base URL for the Admin API

AdminApiBaseAddress.description: Optional base URL for Admin API docs. Defaults to AdminApiClient:BaseAddress when empty.

TicketingApiBaseAddress.description: Base URL for Ticketing API docs.

ClientApiBaseAddress.description: Base URL for Client API docs.

ApiKey.description: Firebase Web API key for the admin tenant

AuthDomain.description: Firebase auth domain for the admin tenant

ProjectId.description: Firebase project ID for the admin tenant

AppId.description: Firebase web app ID for the admin tenant

TenantId.description: Firebase Auth tenant ID for admin users

FirebaseAuth.description: Firebase Web SDK authentication settings for admin users

TenantId.description: Firebase Auth tenant ID for admin users

ServiceAccountJsonPath.description: Path to a Firebase service account JSON file

BucketName.description: Google Cloud Storage bucket name used by shared portal infrastructure.

ServiceAccountJson.description: Google Cloud service account JSON content.

ServiceAccountJsonPath.description: Path to a Google Cloud service account JSON file.

CloudStorage.description: Google Cloud Storage settings for shared portal infrastructure

ApplicationName.description: ASP.NET Core DataProtection application name shared by all admin portal instances.

KeyRingObjectName.description: Google Cloud Storage object name containing the admin portal DataProtection key ring XML.

DataProtection.description: ASP.NET Core DataProtection key-ring persistence settings

CookieName.description: Firebase session cookie name issued by the Admin API.

Domain.description: Cookie domain. Leave empty for host-only cookies.

Secure.description: Whether the session cookie is Secure.

RecentSignInWindow.description: Maximum age of the Firebase ID token auth_time accepted when creating a session.

CheckRevoked.description: Whether session-cookie verification checks Firebase token revocation.

AdminSession.description: Admin API Firebase session cookie settings

DefaultCulture.description: Default culture code used by Admin Portal

TimeZoneId.description: IANA or Windows timezone ID used for admin-facing date and time display

Localization.description: Admin Portal localization and display settings

DefaultExpirationHours.description: Default payment-link expiration duration, in hours, used by Admin Portal when creating or regenerating payment links

PathBase.description: Public path prefix when hosted behind a reverse proxy (e.g. "/admin"). Leave empty when serving at the site root.

Enabled.description: Enable ForwardedHeadersMiddleware to honor X-Forwarded-Proto, X-Forwarded-Host, and X-Forwarded-For from the reverse proxy.

KnownProxies.description: Known proxy IP addresses allowed to set forwarded headers. Leave empty in container/ingress deployments to clear the defaults and trust any upstream (safe when the container is only reachable via the proxy).

KnownNetworks.description: Known proxy networks in CIDR notation (e.g. "10.0.0.0/8") allowed to set forwarded headers. Leave empty to clear defaults.

ForwardedHeaders.description: Forwarded headers handling for reverse-proxy deployments. Disabled by default.
